findings.location: s1 — ブラウザ種別の特定 Java code example
findings.description: The knowledge file silently corrects a syntax error present in the source. Source has `if browserType.equals("MSIE"))` (missing opening parenthesis, invalid Java syntax). Knowledge file shows `if (browserType.equals("MSIE")) {` (corrected syntax). While this is a likely typo in the source, the resulting code in the knowledge file differs from the source.
findings.source_evidence: Source line: `if browserType.equals("MSIE")) {` — Knowledge file line: `if (browserType.equals("MSIE")) {`
